title: Pilots, controllers and hundreds of people spotted a UFO squad in Belo Horizonte-MG [1972]

text_preview:
JULY 27th, 1972. Time: 10:25 pm.

## Report by J.F.S. – Head of NPV SBBH [Belo Horizonte Airport Flight Protection Nucleus]

## TRANSLATION

“At 21:01:25Z, the pilot of plane PP-VJO reported Cleusa FL 190 VMC NOT position, and shortly after he asked TWR-BH if we were observing unidentified objects moving in the East sector of Belo Horizonte, as he was seeing them in a different way. We immediately observed [the sector] through the binoculars and we could see a streak of whitish light disappearing towards Nova Lima. We asked PP-VJO if the object was disappearing and this confirmed it. At this m
summary: On Jul 27 1972, pilots, ATC controllers, and hundreds of civilians in Belo Horizonte reported a squadron of luminous objects moving at low altitude with a filament trail in formation.
